hero.description: I build modern websites for small businesses: a few design options to choose from, full SEO setup and help launching ads on Google and social media. Live in 3–5 days, from $300.

about.introduction: Hi! I'm Leonid. I help small businesses get a website fast and at a fair price. I'm with you every step: from idea to launching your first ad campaign.
about.approachDescription: First we talk through your idea. Then I prepare a few design options so you can pick the one you love. After that I optimise the site for Google and help launch your first ad campaigns.
about.cleanCodeDescription: I build sites fast and at a fair price — without losing quality or design.
about.responsiveDescription: Don't like the first version? No problem. I prepare a few concepts until we find the one you really love.
about.modernDescription: I set up SEO, Google Analytics, GTM and help with basic Google Ads and Meta (Facebook/Instagram) campaigns.
about.clientFocusedDescription: No tech jargon, no wasted spend. I explain in plain language what we're doing and why.

process.description: A transparent 4-step process — you see the progress and stay in control at every stage.

step1.title: Brief
step1.description: Free 30-minute call: we discuss your goals, competitors and priorities.

step2.title: 2–3 design concepts
step2.description: I prepare a few design options. Don't like them? I redo them for free.

step3.title: Build and revisions
step3.description: I share progress and we make changes together. You see the site at every stage.

step4.title: Launch + SEO + ads
step4.description: We publish the site, connect analytics and launch your first campaigns.

guarantee.description: I work transparently and honestly — so you stay confident in the result.

item1.title: Don't like the design? I redo it
item1.description: At the concept stage I revise designs for free until you're happy with the result.

item2.title: 30 days of post-launch support
item2.description: Free edits, answers to your questions and help for the first month after launch.

item3.title: Pay in stages
item3.description: Transparent milestones and staged payment. No full upfront payment required.

portfolio.description: A few sites I've built for businesses around the world: landing pages, corporate sites and multilingual platforms. Click any project to see more.

project1.title: Forensic Institute Platform
project1.description: Website for a team of forensic experts: clear service catalogue, request form and easy navigation for clients and law firms.

project2.title: International Arbitration Chamber
project2.description: Platform for an arbitration organisation with users from 35+ countries. Multiple languages, expert database and easy consultation booking.

project3.title: Legal help for Ukrainians in Poland
project3.description: Simple, clear site for Ukrainians in Poland: services in two languages and an easy consultation booking form.

project4.title: Lemon Shine Cleaning
project4.description: Cleaning company in Poland with online booking, service packages and a simple order form.

project5.title: Spotless Pro Home Cleaning
project5.description: Premium cleaning service for the UK market: clean design, customer reviews and easy booking.

project6.title: Laser Beauty Studio
project6.description: Site for a laser treatment studio in Germany: treatment catalogue, before/after gallery and online booking.

portfolio.orderSimilar: I want a site like this

services.description: Everything you need to launch a site and start getting customers — from design to your first ad campaigns.

service1.title: Websites done for you
service1.description: Landing pages, corporate sites and simple web apps. Fast, modern and affordable.

service2.title: Multiple design options
service2.description: I prepare 2–3 design concepts so you can pick the one you love. Then we refine it together.

service3.title: SEO optimisation
service3.description: I set up your site so Google can find it: technical SEO, meta tags, speed, mobile version, sitemap.

service4.title: Google Ads
service4.description: Basic Google Ads setup. I'll help launch your first campaigns and explain how to read the reports.

service5.title: Facebook & Instagram ads
service5.description: Basic Meta Ads setup: ad account, first creatives, audiences and test campaigns.

service6.title: Google Analytics & GTM
service6.description: I connect analytics and Google Tag Manager so you can see where customers come from and what works best.

services.whyChooseMe: Why working with me is easy
services.benefit1: I prepare several design options to choose from
services.benefit2: Your site is built to be found on Google
services.benefit3: I help with ads, not just the website
services.benefit4: I speak plain language, no jargon

whyAiSpa.description: Simply put — why working with me gets you a modern site faster and cheaper without losing quality.

benefit1.title: Fast
benefit1.description: Your site is ready in 3–5 days, not months. You start getting customers earlier.

benefit2.title: Several designs to choose from
benefit2.description: Instead of one option, you get two or three. Pick the one you love, and we polish it together.

benefit3.title: SEO from day one
benefit3.description: The site is built optimised for Google: speed, meta tags, structure, mobile version.

benefit4.title: Help with ads
benefit4.description: I'll help launch Google Ads and Facebook/Instagram campaigns so first customers come in the first weeks.

benefit5.title: Analytics
benefit5.description: I connect Google Analytics and GTM. You see real numbers: where people come from and what works.

benefit6.title: Support after launch
benefit6.description: I don't disappear after delivery. I'll help with tweaks and explain what to do next.

comparison.title: How it compares to an agency

aiSpa.title: Working with me
aiSpa.point1: Site ready in days, not months
aiSpa.point2: Multiple design options to pick from
aiSpa.point3: Site, SEO and ads — from one person

technicalBenefits.title: What you get in the end

faq.description: Answers to the questions I get most often — about price, timing, design, SEO and ads.
faq.question1: How much does a website cost?
faq.answer1: Simple landing page — from $300. Multi-page site — from $600. I'll give you an exact price after a short free call once I understand the task.
faq.answer2: I work fast: a simple landing — 3–5 days, a corporate site — 1–2 weeks. Depends on pages and features.
faq.question3: Do I get several design options?
faq.answer3: Yes. I prepare 2–3 concepts so you're not stuck with a single version. Then we refine the chosen one together.
faq.answer4: Yes. Basic SEO is included: speed, meta tags, mobile version, sitemap, robots.txt. I also connect Google Search Console.
faq.answer5: Yes — basic Google Ads and Facebook/Instagram (Meta) Ads setup. We launch your first campaigns and I explain how to read the reports.
faq.answer6: Yes — Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager. You'll see where visitors come from and how much each customer costs.
faq.question7: Can I update the site myself?
faq.answer7: Yes. If needed I'll set up a simple panel to update text and images. First edits are free.
faq.answer8: Yes — the first month after launch is free support. After that we can agree on regular support or one-off changes.

contact.description: Tell me briefly about your idea — I'll take a look and come back with suggestions. The first call is free.

footer.description: Modern websites done for you: design options, SEO and help with ads. Simple, fast and built to bring you customers.
